steps.text: Bakers make bread and cakes for everyone. They start work very, very early — before the sun even comes up! Press Start baking.
steps.feedback: Four o'clock in the morning! It is still dark. The baker is already hard at work while everyone else is asleep.

steps.text: After a few hours, the bread is ready. Then the shop opens so people can buy it. Press Shop opens!
steps.feedback: Seven o'clock — the sun is up and the shop is open. Fresh bread, ready to go!

steps.text: Next comes the busy morning — lots of customers! Press Busy morning.
steps.feedback: Ten o'clock — the shop is full! Everyone wants bread for lunch.

steps.text: Last of all, the baker closes the shop and goes home to rest. Press Shop closes.
steps.feedback: Two o'clock and the baker is done! Start baking, open the shop, busy morning, then home. That is the baker's whole day.
